description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the openjdk:7-jdk Docker image. Add a global before_script that runs apt-get update -yq and installs zip, unzip, make, python-biopython, ant, gcc, g++, cmake, valgrind, and zlib1g-dev, then executes ./compile.sh;. Define a compile_and_test job in the default test stage that runs ./compile.sh; followed by ./test_simple.sh;. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, services, rules, or deployment targets.
